title: tetrataenium cardiocarpum
intro: Tetrataenium cardiocarpum, also known as Cardiocarpum, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and is also used to reduce fever. The health benefits of Tetrataenium cardiocarpum include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it a useful remedy for conditions like asthma and pneumonia. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms and promote recovery.
